notes: Embedded oracle: admin calls `Oracle.add_asset` (e.g. symbol BTC, 8 decimals) to get sequential asset ids; `Fin.register_asset` links market symbol (e.g. BTC/USD) to that assetId.
Round manager uses Binance → `Oracle.submit_round` before settle/start; RELAYER_MNEMONIC must match `Fin.init` oracle_authority.
Legacy DIA polling (`npm start`) is off unless ORACLE_ENABLE_PUSH=true; diaBaseUrl is only used for that path.
